title: ChunkLock Modpack
description: Chunklock data pack and mods combined.
body:
ChunkLock features a datapack that you insert into your worlds and we added some mods to it so you can play with an even better experience!

Make sure to check out the official Chunklock data pack description to show you how to add the datapack to your Minecraft world that you create using this link: [https://modrinth.com/datapack/chunklock](https://modrinth.com/datapack/chunklock)

When it comes to hosting servers, I always trust BisectHosting. New customers can use https://www.bisecthosting.com/JaggerGTV to save 25% on their first month of a gaming server, and their dedicated support team is available 24/7 to provide you with top-notch assistance.

# Mods:

- AmbientSounds
- Chat Heads
- Cloth Config API
- Clumps
- CreativeCore
- Essential Mod
- Fabric API
- Fabric Language Kotlin
- Inventory Profiles Next
- Iris Shaders
- Lithium
- Mod Menu
- Mouse Tweaks
- Not Enough Animations
- Shulker Box Tooltip
- Sodium
- Text Placeholder API
- Xaero's Minimap
- Xaero's World Map
- YUNG's API
- libIPN

# Shaders:

- Complementary Shaders - Reimagined

# Data Packs: 

- ChunkLock
